examples: A weary hiker stumbled upon another hiker deep in the North Woods.
Soon, they were joined on their perch by another hiker named Simon.
One hiker, dressed in pink, was looking over the lip of the cliff with her husband.
It "then moved into the hiker parade, where it started striking hikers, " Nunly said.
Another person, described as a 60-year-old male experienced hiker, is missing after a separate avalanche nearby.
